headline: LPL Financial partners with Anthropic to bring Claude AI to 30,000 advisors
summary: LPL Financial has announced an expanded partnership with Anthropic to deploy Claude AI across its network of 30,000 independent financial advisors. The integration will embed Claude into LPL's ClientWorks platform — the primary workstation for LPL advisors — enabling AI-assisted client communications, portfolio analysis, and compliance documentation. This is the largest deployment of Anthropic's Claude in the wealth management segment to date. LPL joins a growing list of financial firms choosing Anthropic over OpenAI, citing Claude's performance on complex reasoning tasks and its enterprise safety guarantees.
